name: Tyler Creek Rectangular Dining Room Table Brown/Black - Signature Design by Ashley
description: Invite your family into the heart of your home with this rectangular dining room table. Tapered legs are a sturdy foundation. Black finish is beautifully textured. Timeworn planked oak top creates a unique two-tone contrast. Store away smaller items in the drawers. This is trend-right urban farmhouse style. Signature Design by Ashley is a registered trademark of Ashley Furniture Industries, Inc.
